location_precision.why: Every finding carries a usable file:line (e.g. 'src/sync.py:14', 'src/report.py:11').

interaction_synthesis.why: Findings are listed independently; even the adjacent SQL-syntax-error (:35) and swallowed-exception (:38) defects are never connected into a stated compound failure mechanism.
